name: Coco Shore
description: Coco Shore is a sun-kissed, luxurious escape captured in a bottle. A warm, creamy blend of exotic coconut milk and radiant tiare flowers, grounded by sweet vanilla and warm amber.
story: Inspired by the pristine white sands of a tropical paradise at golden hour. Coco Shore evokes the sensation of warm sun on the skin and the gentle rustle of palm trees, offering an elegant beachside escape.

name: Elixir Gold
description: Elixir Gold is an intense and opulent fragrance for the bold. A rich, spicy symphony of cinnamon and cardamom, blending into warm woods and amber.
story: Designed to capture the essence of liquid gold, this fragrance represents wealth, power, and prestige. It is a powerful, long-lasting scent that leaves a memorable, warm trail.

name: Kirke Moon
description: Kirke Moon is an enchanting, magical blend of sweet tropical fruits and deep musk. Bright, luscious passionfruit and peach are enveloped in a velvety base of vanilla and warm sand.
story: Inspired by the sorceress Circe and the celestial light of the moon. Kirke Moon is a mysterious, hypnotic scent that captivates anyone who crosses its path.

name: Libre Soul
description: Libre Soul is a celebration of freedom and elegance. A striking combination of Moroccan orange blossom and French lavender, creating a uniquely bold and sophisticated floral fragrance.
story: Designed for the modern, free-spirited soul who lives by their own rules. A perfect balance of masculine strength and feminine grace, embodying pure luxury and confidence.

name: Opium Night
description: Opium Night is a seductive, addictive fragrance that rules the dark. An energizing shot of rich black coffee blended with sweet vanilla and white florals for a mysterious, captivating aura.
story: Inspired by the thrilling energy of a midnight adventure. Opium Night is designed for the modern woman who is glamorous, rebellious, and effortlessly seductive.

name: Qessah
description: Qessah (meaning 'Story' in Arabic) is a rich, majestic oriental fragrance. Precious agarwood (oud) and spicy saffron are beautifully softened by delicate rose and warm amber.
story: A tribute to the rich history and luxury of Middle Eastern perfumery. Qessah tells a story of heritage, nobility, and timeless elegance through its deep, captivating layers.

name: Scandal
description: Scandal is a deliciously decadent fragrance that breaks all the rules. A mouth-watering blend of sweet golden honey and juicy blood orange, resting on a sensual caramel and patchouli base.
story: Born to cause a stir, Scandal is a fragrance of contrast—elegant by day, wild and sensual by night. It is a playful yet sophisticated scent that leaves a trail of intrigue.

name: Silver Sahar
description: Silver Sahar is a crisp, refreshing breeze in the desert morning. A clean, energizing blend of sparkling bergamot, green tea, and blackcurrant over a base of pure white musk.
story: Inspired by the cool, crystal-clear streams flowing through the majestic mountains at dawn. Silver Sahar represents purity, freshness, and the modern explorer's spirit.

name: Valley Elite
description: Valley Elite is a luxurious, fruity-woody fragrance of unmatched refinement. Sweet pineapple and melon are balanced with crisp green notes and a warm, woody-amber base.
story: Created for the elite who command respect. Valley Elite evokes the atmosphere of a lush, green valley under a golden sun, expressing absolute sophistication and success.

name: Y Vision
description: Y Vision is a bold, aromatic fragrance that represents accomplishment. A fresh, crisp opening of apple and ginger transitions into herbal sage and deep woody amber.
story: Designed for the visionary who turns dreams into reality. Y Vision is the fragrance of achievement, representing the drive, passion, and elegance of the modern gentleman.

name: Aeon
description: AEON is a masterpiece of modern perfumery, blending creamy vanilla with sophisticated tobacco notes. A scent that transcends time, creating an intimate and warm embrace with every application.
story: Inspired by the concept of eternity, AEON represents a timeless moment captured in fragrance. Each note has been carefully selected to create a sensory journey that evolves throughout the day, telling a story of elegance and sophistication.
